# Contribution idea

## What should improve?

Describe the feature, demo, benchmark, tool, or documentation improvement.

## Why does it matter?

Explain the enterprise or developer value.

## Suggested implementation

- [ ] Add or update code
- [ ] Add tests
- [ ] Add demo/docs

## Acceptance criteria

A maintainer or contributor should be able to verify the change with `pytest -q` and, when relevant, `python demo/run_demo.py`.
